## 📋 Type of Change
- [ ] **A11y Fix:** Automated or AI-assisted remediation of accessibility violations.
- [ ] **Core Engine:** Changes to AST parsing, rules engine, or strategist logic.
- [ ] **Tooling/CI:** Updates to internal scripts, GitHub Actions, or repository hygiene.
- [ ] **Documentation:** Updates to READMEs or internal technical docs.

## ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] **Analysis:** `dart analyze` passes with zero hints/warnings.
- [ ] **Formatting:** `dart format .` has been executed.
- [ ] **Regression:** `internal/scripts/audit_run.sh` confirms no existing rules are broken.
- [ ] **AI Safety:** No API keys or sensitive credentials are committed.
